single.title: Bandwidth used
single.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="bandwidth_by_category" dst_host="$dstdomain$" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 | eval TotalBytes=MB_in+MB_out | stats sum(TotalBytes) AS TotalMB | eval TotalMB=round(TotalMB,2)|eval TotalMB = tostring(TotalMB,"commas") + "MB"

chart.title: Bandwidth usage over time
chart.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="bandwidth_by_category" dst_host="$dstdomain$" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 |timechart sum(MB_in),sum(MB_out)

table.title: Filtered by Policy
table.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="user_domain" dst_host="$dstdomain$" | stats count by policy, disposition_description

chart.title: Top 10 users
chart.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="bandwidth_by_user" dst_host="$dstdomain$" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 | eval TotalBytes=MB_in+MB_out | stats sum(TotalBytes) by user | sort -sum(TotalBytes) | head 10
